input.system:
You are a streaming video agent. You observe 2-second video chunks and maintain memory.

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

samples.output: <think>A man in a black polo shirt with a white logo uses two yellow-handled tire levers to pry a bicycle tire from the rim. The view clears to show the text "SCI AUTO CENTRE" on his chest while he leverages the tools against the wheel edge.</think><answer></answer>

[4-8] In a workshop setting, the man reaches for tools on a pegboard, selecting a yellow-handled tire lever which he holds up and presents. [8-10] He sits on the floor working on a bicycle wheel, with a red air compressor and coiled yellow hose visible in the background. [10-14] The view shifts to an extreme close-up of fingers holding a small, silver, cylindrical metal component with a knurled texture against a blurred dark background.

[14-16] The blue and grey "SCI ACTIVE NETWORK" logo displays on a white background, transitioning to a man in a black polo shirt sitting on the floor with a bicycle wheel. [16-20] Close-ups reveal a light blue wristband on his left wrist as he manipulates the black tire against the rim, followed by a medium shot of him holding the wheel upright near wooden wall framing. [20-26] He employs two yellow-handled tire levers to pry the black tire bead over the metal rim edge, applying downward pressure to separate the tire from the wheel. [26-28] Finally, a close-up shows his hands pulling the black inner tube out from beneath the tire bead without the levers.

recent_thinks: [28-30] A close-up shows hands working on a bicycle wheel. The left wrist has a light blue band. Fingers manipulate the black tire edge. A silver metal tire lever is then used to pry the rubber bead away from the metal rim.

[30-32] A close-up shows a silver metal tire lever wedged under the black tire bead. As the tool leverages upward, the rubber tire lifts away from the rim, revealing a red strip lining the wheel's interior. The person's hands manipulate the tire and tool, with a light blue band visible on the left wrist.

[32-34] After the close-up sequence, a hand wearing a light blue wristband is seen touching the tire tread. The man in the black polo shirt then utilizes a yellow-handled tool to lever the tire bead away from the metal rim.

[34-36] A man in a black polo shirt sits on the floor holding a bicycle wheel. He uses a yellow-handled tire lever inserted under the tire bead to pry it from the rim. His left hand stabilizes the top of the tire while his right hand manipulates the tool near the bottom of the wheel.

[36-38] A man in a black polo shirt sits on the floor holding a bicycle wheel. He uses a yellow-handled tire lever inserted under the tire bead to pry the black rubber tire away from the metal rim, applying leverage with his right hand while stabilizing the wheel with his left.

[38-40] A man in a black polo shirt sits on the floor holding a bicycle wheel upright. He has placed the yellow-handled tool between his legs and now uses both hands to grip and manipulate the black tire bead, pulling it away from the rim to continue the removal process.

[40-42] A man in a black polo shirt sits cross-legged, holding a bicycle wheel upright. The black tire is partially detached from the rim, revealing a red strip inside. He uses his hands to grip and manipulate the tire bead along the metal rim edge, continuing the removal process with yellow-handled tools resting nearby.

queries.question: What maintenance task is the person performing on the bicycle wheel? A. Inflating a bicycle tire B. Adjusting bicycle spokes C. Changing a bicycle tire D. Cleaning a bicycle rim

samples.output: <think>The camera zooms in on a man wearing a black polo shirt with a white "SCI ACTIVE NETWORK" logo. He wears a light blue wristband on his left wrist. He holds a bicycle wheel with both hands, using his fingers to manipulate the black tire bead along the rim edge.</think><answer></answer>

[4-8] In a workshop setting, the man reaches for tools on a pegboard, selecting a yellow-handled tire lever which he holds up and presents. [8-10] He sits on the floor working on a bicycle wheel, with a red air compressor and coiled yellow hose visible in the background. [10-14] The view shifts to an extreme close-up of fingers holding a small, silver, cylindrical metal component with a knurled texture against a blurred dark background.

[14-16] The blue and grey "SCI ACTIVE NETWORK" logo displays on a white background, transitioning to a man in a black polo shirt sitting on the floor with a bicycle wheel. [16-20] Close-ups reveal a light blue wristband on his left wrist as he manipulates the black tire against the rim, followed by a medium shot of him holding the wheel upright near wooden wall framing. [20-26] He employs two yellow-handled tire levers to pry the black tire bead over the metal rim edge, applying downward pressure to separate the tire from the wheel. [26-28] Finally, a close-up shows his hands pulling the black inner tube out from beneath the tire bead without the levers.

recent_thinks: [28-30] A close-up shows hands working on a bicycle wheel. The left wrist has a light blue band. Fingers manipulate the black tire edge. A silver metal tire lever is then used to pry the rubber bead away from the metal rim.

[30-32] A close-up shows a silver metal tire lever wedged under the black tire bead. As the tool leverages upward, the rubber tire lifts away from the rim, revealing a red strip lining the wheel's interior. The person's hands manipulate the tire and tool, with a light blue band visible on the left wrist.

queries.question: What is the primary color of the polo shirt worn by the man demonstrating the tire change? A. Blue B. Grey C. Black D. Red

samples.output: <think>After the close-up sequence, a hand wearing a light blue wristband is seen touching the tire tread. The man in the black polo shirt then utilizes a yellow-handled tool to lever the tire bead away from the metal rim.</think><answer></answer>
